attributes.action: Install cameras in all nursery rooms and schools to stop abuse or record abuse.
attributes.additional_details: Insist on cctv in each teaching environment.
attributes.background: Install cctv to prevent or at least have evidence of any abuse cases by either adults or children. The latest child rapes could have been detected sooner if they had evidence sooner.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Require CCTV in all early years settings" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750797
